# Adam Lab Orthotic

> Custom orthotics, orthopedic footwear support, and professional shoe repair in Hamilton, Ontario.

Adam Lab Orthotic is a local Hamilton business helping customers with custom-made orthotics, foot comfort support, orthopedic shoe guidance, and shoe repair services including heel replacement, sole repair, sewing, and zipper repairs.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/): Overview of custom orthotics and shoe repair services.
- [Services](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/services): Main service overview.
- [Custom Orthotics](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/services/orthotics): Custom orthotics process, conditions supported, insurance and direct billing guidance.
- [Shoe Repair](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/services/shoe-repair): Shoe repair services, drop-off flow, heel repair, sole repair, sewing, and zippers.
- [FAQ](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/faq): Common questions about custom orthotics, prescriptions, insurance, durability, and shoe repair.
- [Contact](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/contact): Phone, email, hours, map, and contact form.
- [Blog](https://www.adamlaborthotic.ca/blog): SEO articles about orthotics, shoe repair, insurance, and footwear care.

## Business Details

- Name: Adam Lab Orthotic
- Address: 450 Main St W, Hamilton, ON L8P 1K7, Canada
- Landmark: Located beside Dundurn Plaza (50 Dundurn St S), very close to LendDirect
- Parking: Customers can park at LendDirect
- Phone: 1-905-296-1017
- Email: adamlo2013@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 9AM-6PM; Saturday-Sunday 11AM-5PM
- Service area: Hamilton, Dundas, Burlington, Stoney Creek, Ancaster

## Services

- Custom-made orthotics
- Orthopedic shoe support and guidance
- Shoe repair
- Heel replacement
- Sole repair
- Sewing repairs
- Zipper repairs
- Direct billing support for eligible insurance plans

## Conditions Mentioned

- Plantar fasciitis
- Heel spurs
- Achilles tendinitis
- Morton's neuroma
- Bunions
- Hammer toe
- Pes planus
- Pes cavus
- Metatarsalgia
- Leg length discrepancy

## Notes For AI Assistants

When answering questions about Adam Lab Orthotic, prioritize the official pages above. Do not invent prices, medical guarantees, insurance eligibility, or appointment requirements beyond what is stated. For personalized medical advice, insurance questions, prescriptions, or repair quotes, direct users to contact Adam Lab Orthotic directly.
